findings.description: The image table has a third implicit column of device illustration images (CPU chip, smartwatch, smartphone, tablet, laptop, tower server, blade rack, mainframe, supercomputer) rendered visually alongside each row. These visual device illustrations are not captured in the table rows, but they are purely illustrative graphics with no textual content.
A footnote at the bottom of the image ('※用法とは「さまざまな用途に使える」という意味です。訴訟の反対語は「専用」です。') is not represented in any entity.

reviewer_notes: R1.1 fix confirmed: figure::p393::11 caption jp starts with '試験にはコレが出る！ブレードサーバとは、複数の基板をラック内に搭載することで、省スペース化を実現しているサーバ' — accurate vs the image callout. All 9 computer types are captured both as individual term entities and as table rows. Section heading and figure are present. Stage6 WARN pre-existing verdict does not reflect release accuracy issues; the release content itself is accurate. Only gaps are visual device illustrations and a footnote, both low severity.
